home.title: Office Detective
home.subtitle: Solve corporate investigation cases by analyzing documents, connecting evidence, and uncovering the truth using AI-powered tools.

analyzeDocuments.title: Analyze Documents
analyzeDocuments.description: Browse emails, chats, invoices, and more to find crucial evidence.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Ask questions and get AI-powered insights with source citations.

buildCase.title: Build Your Case
buildCase.description: Connect entities on the evidence board and submit your findings.

cases.title: Investigation Cases
cases.subtitle: Select a case to begin your investigation
cases.noCases: No cases available yet. Start the backend server and create your first case.
cases.guidedDemoDescription: New here? Generate a playable tutorial case in one click.
cases.guidedDemoError: Could not create the guided demo case right now.

streak.title: Operations board
streak.emptyHistory: No resolved runs yet. Close your first case to start a streak.

daily_closer.label: Daily closer
daily_closer.hint: Resolve 2 different cases with 80+ score today.

weekly_sprint.label: Weekly sprint
weekly_sprint.hint: Finish 6 submissions with 75+ score this week.

weekly_variety.label: Weekly variety
weekly_variety.hint: Solve 4 different cases with 80+ score this week.

weekly_clean_chain.label: Clean chain
weekly_clean_chain.hint: Complete 3 consecutive 80+ runs without hints this week.

monthly_master.label: Monthly mastermind
monthly_master.hint: Finish 12 runs with 85+ score this month.

caseCreator.title: Create Your Own Case
caseCreator.subtitle: Describe your scenario and answer guided questions. The system generates entities, evidence docs, and a playable investigation flow.

questions.ideaDescription: Write the story context you want to investigate. Mention what feels suspicious.
questions.setupDescription: Pick company, scenario type, and overall complexity.
questions.peopleDescription: Name the suspected person and add collaborators, witnesses, or reviewers.
questions.reviewDescription: Confirm your setup and generate the case.

fields.ideaPlaceholder: Example: Procurement approved a new supplier too quickly and payments started before onboarding was complete...
fields.culpritPlaceholder: Name of the person you want as likely culprit
fields.peoplePlaceholder: Ava Kim, Ethan Cole, Finance Lead...

helpers.peopleFormat: Add at least two extra names so the investigation has enough context.

prompts.ideaText: What is the suspicious office story you want to simulate?
prompts.peopleText: Which real or fictional names should appear in evidence and conversations?
prompts.evidenceText: How hard should this be and what kind of fraud pattern do you want?

errors.generic: Could not create custom case. Please try again.

caseDetail.notFoundDesc: The case you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

instructions.browse: Browse the document inbox to read emails, chats, and other evidence
instructions.askAria: Ask ARIA for help analyzing documents and finding connections
instructions.buildBoard: Build your evidence board by pinning key documents and entities
instructions.submit: Submit your findings when you've identified the culprit(s)

tutorial.title: Guided sprint
tutorial.subtitle: Follow these 4 steps to complete your first case in minutes.

inbox.title: Open the inbox
inbox.description: Read 2-3 documents and identify suspicious names, approvals, or payments.

chat.title: Ask ARIA
chat.description: Ask who approved unusual transactions and request cited answers.

board.title: Map the board
board.description: Pin evidence and mark at least one suspect to build your theory.

submit.title: Submit your report
submit.description: Choose culprits, attach evidence, and explain your reasoning.

chat.title: ARIA Assistant
chat.emptyDescription: Ask ARIA about the case. You can inquire about documents, entities, relationships, or request help finding evidence.
chat.citationNote: ARIA will cite relevant documents in responses.

examples.connections: What connections exist between the vendor and employees?

chat.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

board.title: Evidence Board
board.needTwoSuspects: Mark at least 2 suspects to trace a path

filters.emptyDescription: Adjust search or clear filters to show your board again.

board.emptyDescription: Search for people or documents to begin. Mark suspects and collect evidence.

onboarding.title: First five minutes
onboarding.description: Complete these quick actions to build your first workable case theory.

inbox.title: Scan evidence
inbox.description: Open at least one document and identify key names, dates, or anomalies.

chat.title: Interrogate ARIA
chat.description: Ask ARIA one targeted question to uncover hidden links or suspicious patterns.

board.title: Seed the board
board.description: Load high-signal hubs so your board starts with useful investigative anchors.

feedback.syncFailed: Could not sync graph right now.
feedback.hubsFailed: Could not load hubs right now.
feedback.traceFailed: Could not trace suspects right now.
feedback.syncSuccess: Graph synced: {nodes} nodes and {links} links ready.
feedback.hubsLoaded: Loaded {count} high-signal hubs on the board.
feedback.hubsEmpty: No hubs found yet. Sync graph or add entities first.
feedback.traceNoPath: No clear path found between your top suspects yet.
feedback.searchAdded: Added {entities} entities and {documents} documents to the board.
feedback.persistenceUnavailable: Board autosave is unavailable in this session.

reliability.title: Evidence reliability
reliability.helper: Set how trustworthy this item is for your theory.

hypothesis.helper: Capture your current theory and refine it as you gather evidence.
hypothesis.label: Working hypothesis
hypothesis.placeholder: Example: Finance manager coordinated vendor approvals with fake invoices.
hypothesis.defaultText: Suspicious approval chain points to internal collusion.

mobileLayers.selectNodePrompt: Select a node on the map to open details.
mobileLayers.noSelectionDescription: Tap a person or document on the map to inspect it.
mobileLayers.snapshotDescription: Review suspects and pinned evidence before submitting.
mobileLayers.emptyDescription: Pin documents or entities and mark suspects from the board.

evidencePanel.title: My Evidence
evidencePanel.subtitle: Pin documents and mark suspects
evidencePanel.emptySuspects: Mark people as suspects from the board
evidencePanel.requirements: You need at least 1 suspect and 1 piece of evidence

submit.warningDescription: This action cannot be undone. Make sure you've reviewed all evidence and are confident in your conclusion before submitting.

culprit.title: 1. Identify the Culprit(s)
culprit.description: Select the person(s) responsible for the fraudulent activity.
culprit.prioritizedByConfidence: Suspects are sorted by your confidence level from the board.
culprit.empty: No person entities found. Make sure the case has been loaded properly.

evidence.title: 2. Select Supporting Evidence
evidence.description: Choose the documents and evidence that support your conclusion.

explanation.title: 3. Explain Your Reasoning
explanation.description: Provide a brief explanation of how the fraud was committed and how you reached your conclusion.
explanation.placeholder: Describe the fraud mechanism and your reasoning...

validation.needEvidence: Select at least one piece of evidence.
validation.needExplanation: Explanation must be at least 20 characters.

readiness.label: Case readiness
readiness.hint: Strengthen culprit choice, evidence, and explanation before final submission.

timeline_gap.label: Timeline gap detected
timeline_gap.hint: Open new docs to close missing sequence clues.

crossfire.label: Conflicting statements
crossfire.hint: Run more checks through search and ARIA.

suspect_heat.label: Suspect changed behavior
suspect_heat.hint: Re-evaluate and mark another suspect quickly.

board_shock.label: Network anomaly
board_shock.hint: Expand the board to surface hidden links.

evidence_rush.label: Evidence leak
evidence_rush.hint: Pin fresh evidence before leads cool down.

score_recovery.label: Case reopened
score_recovery.hint: Push your score to elite range with a tighter theory.

blitz.label: Blitz run
blitz.hint: Fast execution with no hints used.

rapid.label: Rapid run
rapid.hint: Good pace and controlled hint usage.

steady.label: Steady run
steady.hint: Solid investigation. Push for cleaner and faster closures.

progress.title: Campaign progress
progress.metaUnlocked: Meta missions completed in this run
progress.metaPending: No new meta mission unlocked in this run.
progress.shieldUsed: Streak shield absorbed a failed run in this submission.

search.tryDifferent: Try a different search query or adjust filters.

investigation.title: Investigation Pulse
investigation.readyToSubmit: You are ready to submit your report.
investigation.keepInvestigating: Keep investigating to increase your confidence.

board_mastery.label: Master the board
board_mastery.hint: Grow your board to six nodes.

victory_lap.label: Victory lap
victory_lap.hint: All missions complete. Try a bolder strategy.

timeline_gap.label: Timeline gap detected
timeline_gap.hint: Open new docs to close missing sequence clues.

crossfire.label: Conflicting statements
crossfire.hint: Run more checks through search and ARIA.

suspect_heat.label: Suspect changed behavior
suspect_heat.hint: Re-evaluate and mark another suspect quickly.

board_shock.label: Network anomaly
board_shock.hint: Expand the board to surface hidden links.

evidence_rush.label: Evidence leak
evidence_rush.hint: Pin fresh evidence before leads cool down.

score_recovery.label: Case reopened
score_recovery.hint: Push your score to elite range with a tighter theory.

streak.title: Case streak
streak.hint: Close different cases with 85+ score. Scores below 70 reset the streak.

documents.selectPromptTitle: Open a document to inspect evidence
documents.selectPromptDescription: Choose a document from the inbox or jump to search/chat to gather new leads.

evidenceSidebar.title: Evidence
evidenceSidebar.empty: Pin documents or entities to collect evidence

auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.registerDescription: Create an account to start solving cases
auth.name: Name
